implementation_log: Implemented the final T14 holding-bar semantics fix only. The per-symbol backtest engine now evaluates MaxHoldingPeriodRule against the start-of-step holding_bar_count, initializes newly opened positions with holding_bar_count=0 at fill time, and advances holding_bar_count only after a bar-backed step completes and the long position remains open after that step's fills. Updated the targeted max-holding regression test to enforce the new post-step semantics and catch the prior off-by-one behavior.
test_execution_summary: Static validation only: diagnostics reported no errors in src/tw_quant/backtest/exits.py, src/tw_quant/backtest/engine.py, and tests/test_tw_quant_backtest_exits.py. Recommended targeted runtime command: pytest tests/test_tw_quant_backtest_exits.py -q
summary: The T14 fix is narrowly applied to exit-rule holding-bar semantics in the per-symbol backtest engine and the relevant max-holding regression test.
next_action: Send T14 implementation to Manager/QA for validation of the updated holding-bar semantics.
